{# contact_row.html — Single vendor contact row with inline editing. Receives: c (VendorContact), vendor (VendorCard). Called by: partials/vendors/tabs/contacts.html (loop include), add/update contact routes. Depends on: HTMX, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS. #} {# ── Display mode ────────────────────────────────────────── #} {{ c.full_name or "—" }} {{ c.title or "—" }} {{ c.email or "—" }} {% if c.phone %} {{ c.phone }} {% else %} — {% endif %} {{ c.interaction_count or 0 }}
{# ── Edit mode (double-click or Edit button) ─────────────── #}
